calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The case is ordered dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. The court shall also notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by the Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7(a)(3). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Gregory Haynes, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-07-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
